title: MERN + AI Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Become a Full-Stack Developer with AI Skills
description: Master full-stack development using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js—enhanced with AI tools, APIs, and modern workflows. Build production-ready applications and become job-ready in 3–6 months.

projects.title: Full-Stack Dashboard Application
projects.description: Build a responsive dashboard with full CRUD and Auth.

projects.title: AI Chatbot Integration Project
projects.description: Integrate a custom AI chatbot using OpenAI API.

projects.title: Production-Level Portfolio Website
projects.description: Deploy a fleet of production-ready fullstack apps.

projects.title: End-to-End MERN + AI Application
projects.description: Develop a complete application from scratch with integrated AI features.

requirements: Basic knowledge of JavaScript and web fundamentals is helpful but not mandatory.
Developers looking to upgrade into full-stack + AI

curriculum.title: Web Foundations
curriculum.practice: Build a responsive landing page with AI
curriculum.outcome: Can build mobile-first layouts using Tailwind.

curriculum.title: React Core
curriculum.practice: Build a multi-page interactive React app
curriculum.outcome: Can create dynamic SPAs with React hooks.

curriculum.title: Advanced React & State
curriculum.outcome: Can manage global state and secure routes.

curriculum.title: Node.js & Express
curriculum.practice: Build a scalable backend REST API

curriculum.title: Databases & Prisma
curriculum.outcome: Can model data and optimize storage.

curriculum.title: AI Tools & Workflows
curriculum.practice: Automate tests and docs with AI

curriculum.title: AI Integration
curriculum.practice: Integrate custom AI features into app
curriculum.outcome: Can leverage LLMs for intelligent features.

curriculum.title: Capstone & Portfolio
curriculum.outcome: Job-ready with a major live project.

features: Combines full-stack development with real AI integration
